definition_en: Friendly and enjoying social situations
example: She is very outgoing and makes friends easily.

definition_en: Slow to show feelings or opinions; not openly expressive
example: He is quite reserved until he gets to know you well.

definition_en: Having a strong desire to succeed
example: She is very ambitious and plans to become a director.

definition_en: Refusing to change one's opinion or actions
example: He is too stubborn to admit he was wrong.

definition_en: Able to be trusted to do something well
example: She is one of the most reliable people on the team.

definition_en: Having a strong personal charm that attracts people
example: The new director is charismatic and inspiring.

definition_en: Able to understand and share the feelings of others
example: A good nurse must be empathetic towards patients.

definition_en: Having an exaggerated sense of one's own importance
example: His arrogant attitude made it hard to work with him.

definition_en: Quick at making clever and funny observations
example: She is very witty — she always makes people laugh.

definition_en: Thin and graceful in a positive way
example: She has a tall, slender figure.

definition_en: Short and with a broad, heavy body
example: He is stocky and plays rugby.

definition_en: Small brown spots on the skin, especially the face
example: She has red hair and freckles.

definition_en: Confident and not afraid to take risks
example: It was a bold decision to leave her job and travel.

definition_en: Tending to focus on inner thoughts rather than social interaction
example: He is introverted and prefers working alone.

definition_en: Very careful and paying great attention to every detail
example: She is meticulous in her work — nothing escapes her notice.

definition_en: Feeling and showing concern for others who are suffering
example: He is very compassionate and always helps those in need.

definition_en: Too proud of one's own appearance or abilities
example: She spends hours in front of the mirror — she's very vain.

definition_en: Having a good understanding of situations and people
example: She made some very perceptive comments during the discussion.

definition_en: Having moods that change frequently and unpredictably
example: The actor was known for being temperamental on set.

definition_en: Friendly and easy to talk to
example: The new teacher is very approachable.

definition_en: Direct and outspoken; not afraid to say what you think
example: She is forthright and always tells you exactly what she thinks.

definition_en: Looking untidy and uncared for in appearance
example: He always looks scruffy — his clothes are never ironed.
